_comment: Corpus-regression baselines for OUR qwen3 live corpus (72 skills resident in the running /compose store; 59 audit-eligible domain skills across 11 packs). Captured 2026-06-17 against http://localhost:47950 with EMBEDDER=qwen3-embedding:0.6b. Numbers come from `uv run python -m eval.retrieval_audit --k 4 --live-only` and `uv run python -m eval.gold_hit --k 4`. The --live-only flag intersects the disk _packs probe set (322 domain skills) with the skills actually resident in the live store, so these rates measure retrieval quality over the installed corpus rather than the disk-vs-live install gap. See check_corpus_regression.py for the comparator that consumes this file.
